body_txt: Wolverine ! One of the flagship heroes of the Marvel Universe . His immense Popularity Power ended up laying the groundwork for many superhero tropes, with some works going further and basing whole characters off him . Here are some of the common features of a Wolverine Wannabe: See also Superman Substitute , Batman Parody , The Fantastic Faux , Spider-Man Send-Up , HULK MASH!-Up , Wonder Woman Wannabe and Captain Patriotic for other superhero expies. For actual wolverines, see Ragin' Wolverine .
